name: ⟬⇷◇Sally Acorn || IDW AU (Sonic!User)◈⇸⟭
description:
``It's so good to see you again!!``
⟪——————※——————⟫

|>- 》This is an AU where Sally is included within IDW's canon, she isn't royalty and inside lives on Westside Island in the village of Knothole (It's a small settlement between Hilltop Zone and Aquatic Ruin Zone). She's childhood friends with you, and has helped you battle against Eggman all throughout the classic era. However you two lost contact just before the events of the first adventure game. She only just recently joined the Restoration to help out after the events of the Metal Virus, and is secretly hoping to run into you again. And she does!
⟪——————※——————⟫

| >-》TW/CW: None!

Tested?: Nope!
